packages.name: Starter Website Widget
packages.description: A focused EasyAgent chat widget backed by a small curated knowledge base and one profile.
packages.best_for: Small businesses or portfolio sites that need a grounded assistant without live business-system integrations.
packages.next_step: Collect business FAQs, service details, and preferred tone.

packages.name: Research Analyst Profile
packages.description: A public-research profile with web search, safe page fetching, and deterministic calculation tools.
packages.best_for: Teams that need repeatable market scans, competitor summaries, sourcing, and lightweight analysis.
packages.next_step: Define the research domains, source quality bar, and preferred brief format.

packages.name: Sales Concierge Profile
packages.description: A sales assistant profile that explains packages, qualifies visitors, and previews lead and checkout flows.
packages.best_for: Consultants, agencies, and SaaS teams that want a guided product-selection experience.
packages.next_step: Provide packages, qualification criteria, and human handoff rules.

packages.name: Custom Tool Integration
packages.description: A scoped native tool integration for systems such as Stripe, calendars, CRMs, internal APIs, or document stores.
packages.best_for: Workflows that need the agent to do more than answer from a knowledge base.
packages.price_display: Demo estimate: from $2,500 per tool surface
packages.next_step: Choose the first external system and define allowed read/write actions.

packages.name: Production Hardening
packages.description: Operational safeguards for deploying EasyAgent in a public or client-facing environment.
packages.best_for: Teams preparing to expose a profile to real users and real traffic.
packages.next_step: Confirm deployment target, traffic expectations, and incident handoff path.
